name: [RPG] Epic the musical
description:
🌊 EPIC THE MUSICAL RPG 🌊

✧･ﾟImmerse yourself in the world of ancient Greece with a touch of magic and deities!✧･ﾟ

╔══ ✦ Decide for yourself who to be ✦══╗

𐌗 Choose your role: gladiator · fighter · nymph · god · companion of Odysseus

𐌗 Meet legends: Odysseus & his crew · 12 Olympians · Circe · Calypso · suitors

𐌗 Visit places: Islands of Circe, Aeolus, Calypso · Troy · Palace of Odysseus

╚════ 🜲 ════╝

✦ Create your own story✦

♡I recommend using a proxy for better RP

Tags: epic the musical, Odysseus, Penelope,Telemachus, Antitoy, lorebook, ancient Greece, gods, RPG, god user, god bot
